ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the Initial Public Offering */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Current market capitalization of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield percentage */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update for the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with this price record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the stock price */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the trading session */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the trading session */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous record */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "volume_weighted_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization for the day */,
  "price_change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares owned */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price per share */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the shares were purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio entry */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the value of the portfolio entry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_activity" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price per share at the time of the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "fee" REAL /* Any additional fees associated with the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activity_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market index */,
  "base_date" TEXT /* Date the index was established */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Total market value of the index */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield percentage of the index */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update for the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_prices" (
  "index_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index price record */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the index on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the index on that date */,
  "price_change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full article */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is associated with */,
  "price_threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was checked */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert check (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the transaction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, sale) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stocks involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_price" REAL /* Price at which stocks were bought or sold */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the transaction */,
  "fee" REAL /* Any additional fees associated with the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose portfolio is being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio on that date */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in portfolio value from the previous record */,
  "total_profit_loss" REAL /* Total profit or loss of the portfolio on that date */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment percentage */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "externals_data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the data feed */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the data feed */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data feed */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last sync with the data feed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data feed (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key for the preference (e.g., theme, language) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value for the preference */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial report */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow from operations */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities */,
  "equity" REAL /* Shareholder equity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financials_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
